name: bunshin
description: Autonomous Trello-driven goal loop for Claude Code: drains a board of lightweight goals, implementing each through three gates (deterministic checks, behavioral Playwright smoke, adversarial review) to an auto-merge. Process-only — scaffold the markdown pipeline into any repo and launch the loop.

scripts.test: node test/registry.test.js && node test/watch.test.js && node test/run.test.js && node test/server.smoke.js

author: Javi Morales <javi@moralesf.com>
